original_image_tags: The document page features several stamps and handwritten annotations.

elements.description: Multiple stamps and handwritten annotations. Visible text includes 'Office Memorandum', 'DATE: September 20, 1947', 'G.I.R.-2', 'DECEMBER 1964', 'INDEXED', 'RECORDED', '15 SEP 24 1947', 'COPIES DESTROYED 270 NOV 18 1964', and handwritten numbers '62-83894-118'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of multiple stamps and handwritten annotations, but Description B adds specific quoted text not mentioned in Description A without contradicting it.
